name: Central Mountain Middle School
description: Come play pickleball at Central Mountain Middle School in Mill Hall, PA! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Hanna Park
description: Hanna Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lock Haven, PA. There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Lock Haven YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Lock Haven YMCA in Lock Haven, PA! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Pickleball Haven
description: For details on the totally unique pickleball air bnb  check out our -wwwairbyesnb.com/h/pickleballhaven. A unique glow in the dark court like no other that includes 4 bedrooms to accommodate 8 pickleballers. Court only available to Airbnb guests. Must rent the Airbnb to use the court.

name: Wayne Township Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Wayne Township Pickleball Courts in Lock Haven, PA! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.
